summary: Solid test suite covering core requirements: bump_type, bump_version, read_version, write_version, changelog, and run commands are all tested, plus workflow structure and act integration. Tests exercise multiple commit types, error cases (missing files, invalid semver), and both plain VERSION and package.json formats. Well-organized with clear section comments and independent temp workspaces. Gaps: fixture files referenced but not explicitly created or validated in tests; missing edge cases like empty commit logs, malformed commits, and very large version numbers; changelog output format only checked for section headers, not full structure. act-based workflow testing is thorough. Would catch most regressions but lacks comprehensive boundary condition coverage and explicit fixture precondition validation.
